speaker: GOWER
text: Marina thus the brothel ’scapes, and chances

speaker: GOWER
text: Into an honest house, our story says.

speaker: GOWER
text: She sings like one immortal, and she dances

speaker: GOWER
text: As goddesslike to her admirèd lays.

speaker: GOWER
text: Deep clerks she dumbs, and with her neele composes

speaker: GOWER
text: Nature’s own shape, of bud, bird, branch, or berry,

speaker: GOWER
text: That even her art sisters the natural roses.

speaker: GOWER
text: Her inkle, silk, twin with the rubied cherry,

speaker: GOWER
text: That pupils lacks she none of noble race,

speaker: GOWER
text: Who pour their bounty on her, and her gain

speaker: GOWER
text: She gives the cursèd bawd. Here we her place,

speaker: GOWER
text: And to her father turn our thoughts again,

speaker: GOWER
text: Where we left him, on the sea. We there him lost,

speaker: GOWER
text: Where, driven before the winds, he is arrived

speaker: GOWER
text: Here where his daughter dwells; and on this coast

speaker: GOWER
text: Suppose him now at anchor. The city strived

speaker: GOWER
text: God Neptune’s annual feast to keep, from whence

speaker: GOWER
text: Lysimachus our Tyrian ship espies,

speaker: GOWER
text: His banners sable, trimmed with rich expense,

speaker: GOWER
text: And to him in his barge with fervor hies.

speaker: GOWER
text: In your supposing once more put your sight

speaker: GOWER
text: Of heavy Pericles. Think this his bark,

speaker: GOWER
text: Where what is done in action—more, if might—

speaker: GOWER
text: Shall be discovered. Please you sit and hark.
